metaTitle: FIT365 Notice: Unpaid Monthly Membership Fee
headline: 笆 Notice of unpaid monthly fee for 縲・・month 笆
leadUnpaid: We could not confirm payment of your monthly fee from the credit card on file.
note1: Facility use is suspended until payment is confirmed.
note2: Updating your credit card alone does not lift the suspension.
note3: Family members cannot use the facility either.
note4: Depending on when you complete payment, access may resume the following day or later.

howToPayAppOrKiosk: Pay via the 窶廡IT365窶・app or the in-store self-service kiosk.
howToPayAppOnly: Pay via the 窶廡IT365窶・app.
memberNotice: 窶ｻThis notice is sent to our members.
appSectionBody: 窶ｻYou need an activated app and a credit card. After payment, a confirmation email will be sent to your registered address.

lpBlock12Title: FIT365: Monthly fees, billing & credit card update

guideMetaTitle: FIT365: Monthly fees, billing & card update
guideOgDescription: FIT365 guidance on monthly payments and billing, and how to update your credit card in the app.
guideBillSlideAlt: Information graphic about monthly membership billing dates, debit cards, and the security fee.
guideCcSlideAlt: Step-by-step screenshots for updating card information in the FIT365 app.
guideBillBodyHtml:
Our club bills membership fees between
the 6th and the 9th of each month.
Payment may fail due to card expiry or replacement.
Please check the renewal month of the card used for billing
and complete any update by the 5th of the month.
If you use a debit card,
please ensure sufficient funds are available in advance.
If billing fails on the billing date,
your status becomes 窶弑npaid.窶・/span>
We will show this in the FIT365 app
and contact you by SMS.
guideBillBox1Body: By the day before the billing date, please confirm the balance in the bank account used for direct debit.
guideBillBox2BodyHtml:
The security management fee of ﾂ･4,980 (ﾂ･5,478 incl. tax)
is billed together with the monthly fee in the 3rd month, counting your start month as month 1,
and thereafter on the same month each year.
(Example: If you start on Jan 31, it is billed in March. Each March thereafter.)
guideCcTitle: How to change your credit card
guideCcSub: 窶ｻTo change your card, you need your credit or debit card number.
guideCcFooter: After registration, a confirmation email will be sent to your registered email address.
